title_en: Frozen Fruits vs. Bottled Smoothies: The Sweet Truth
title_es: Frutas Congeladas vs. Batidos en Botella: La Dulce Verdad
hook_en: Ever compared your smoothie to soda? Let's dive in!
hook_es: ¿Alguna vez has comparado tu batido con un refresco? ¡Vamos a verlo!
key_message: Frozen whole fruits allow you to control sugar intake, unlike bottled smoothies which often contain more sugar than a can of soda.
visual_elements: Close-up of fresh frozen fruits being blended into a smoothie
Side-by-side of homemade smoothie vs. bottled smoothie
Overhead shot of pouring bottled smoothie into glass with sugar cubes next to it
Text overlay displaying sugar content comparison
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Frozen whole fruits for smoothies vs. PROCESSED: Bottled smoothies (sugar, concentrates, gums, natural flavors) — Bottled smoothies can contain 40-60g sugar — more than a can of soda

title_en: DIY Smoothie vs. Store-Bought: What's in Your Drink?
title_es: Batido Casero vs. Comprado: ¿Qué Hay en Tu Bebida?
hook_en: What's hiding in your store-bought smoothie?
hook_es: ¿Qué se esconde en tu batido comprado?
key_message: Homemade smoothies avoid additives and excess sugar, unlike store-bought ones laden with concentrates and natural flavors.
visual_elements: Split screen of fresh fruit ingredients vs. bottled smoothie
Zoom into ingredient labels showing additives
Pouring homemade smoothie next to bottled one with labels popping up
End screen with a smiley face in front of homemade smoothie
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Frozen whole fruits for smoothies vs. PROCESSED: Bottled smoothies (sugar, concentrates, gums, natural flavors) — Bottled smoothies can contain 40-60g sugar — more than a can of soda
